package WurstExportedObjects_w3b
import ObjEditingNatives
import DestructableObjEditing

// Modified Table (contains all custom objects)

@compiletime function create_w3b_B000()
	new DestructableDefinition('B000', 'ATtc')
	..setName("Ashenvale Canopy Tree (Large)")
	..setMaximumScale(5.0)


// Original Table (contains all modified default/melee objects)
// These are emitted when createObjectDefinition uses the same base/new id.

@compiletime function create_w3b_CTtc()
	new DestructableDefinition('CTtc', 'CTtc')
	..setPath("")
